steps.title: Keep by with its object
steps.content: The phrase is "known by a nickname." The preposition "by" should be followed directly by its noun object, with no intervening punctuation.

steps.title: Remove unnecessary punctuation
steps.content: B uses an em dash, C uses a comma, and D uses a colon; each separates the preposition from "a nickname." The phrase "known by a nickname" needs the preposition directly before its object. The answer is A.
